caption: The video begins with frames that are completely black. The scene then shifts to a workshop setting where a person wearing a red sleeve uses a black handheld power sander on a light-colored wooden surface. In the final segment, the person is seen using a stationary belt sander, pressing a small piece of wood against the rotating abrasive belt. The belt sander is green and black with visible rollers. On-screen text appears in the bottom right area of the final scene, reading "[Voice: Philippe Starck]". The background of the workshop is blurred, showing various tools and equipment on workbenches. The action progresses from sanding a large flat surface with a handheld tool to refining a small piece of wood on a mechanical belt sander.
